hard_rules: this recording is the phone itself
there is no second phone anywhere
the front camera of this same phone is already recording
the shocked reaction must be visible by the third second
after the reaction she must visibly grab and hold this recording phone
her fingers or thumb must be visible on the frame edge so it feels like she is holding the phone
the phone must lift off its resting position and move closer toward her face
the motion should feel like she is about to switch or flip to the back camera to inspect something better
the frame tightening must come from physical device movement, not zoom
goal: Create raw front-camera footage where an American blonde girl gets shocked by what she sees, then clearly grabs and holds the recording phone and lifts it toward her face like she is about to turn on or flip to the back camera.

scene.subject: American blonde girl in her early 20s
scene.lighting: soft practical room light, ordinary and unstyled
scene.style: real raw front phone camera footage, not aesthetic

beats: the phone is resting and already recording from the front camera
medium close framing
she reads something on this phone screen
very little movement
the shock reaction builds and lands by the third second
eyes widen
eyebrows lift
mouth opens slightly
one hand comes to her mouth in disbelief
hold the shocked face clearly by second three
she quickly reaches toward this same recording phone and grabs it
her fingers and thumb are visible along the edge of frame so it is obvious she is holding the phone
the frame lifts off the resting angle and jolts slightly upward
the phone moves toward her face
she is now clearly holding the phone in front-camera mode
the frame is much closer to her face because she brought the phone closer
small handheld shake continues
the motion feels like she is about to flip or switch to the back camera to inspect the screen or surroundings better
she keeps holding the phone close to her face
fingers remain occasionally visible at the frame edge
she stays in shocked disbelief while looking at the screen
no dialogue, only natural room tone

priority_notes: the audience must see proof that she is holding the recording phone
fingers on the edge of frame matter
shock first, then grab and lift
the motion should suggest she might be about to switch to back camera
